address: 598 Upper Sherman Ave, Hamilton, ON L8V 3M2

testimonials.name: Aylin Ozturk
testimonials.quote: Janet and her husband are so lovely - the atmosphere of the nail salon is so warm and welcoming from the moment you walk in!

testimonials.name: Ashley Nicole
testimonials.quote: Been going here for over 15 years- I wait until I'm back to get my nails done if out of the country/city.

testimonials.name: Jodi Peirson Heller
testimonials.quote: Been coming here for over 10 years. I've tried other places but none are as good.

testimonials.name: Mrs Cunningham
testimonials.quote: Paul did such a good job on my nails he was friendly, considerate, and definitely recommend and will be back!

testimonials.name: Tracy Cane Hind
testimonials.quote: Sally is usually the girl that does my manicures and I love her. She does a great job and makes my nails look soooo pretty!!!!

testimonials.name: Phoenix Walker
testimonials.quote: My nails have stayed on for 3 weeks, haven't broken and stayed in great condition.

testimonials.name: Lannaa
testimonials.quote: Came here for the first time today and I loved it! Amazing service and I have social anxiety but everyone made me feel so welcomed and safe

testimonials.name: Jayne Belanger
testimonials.quote: Fantastic massaging chairs, excellent job on both feet and hands. They have the largest variety of colours I have ever seen.

testimonials.name: Gabriela
testimonials.quote: I found P&A when I desperately needed a salon open on Sundays, And I've been coming back since!

testimonials.name: Bailey
testimonials.quote: Not only did they do an amazing job with my mani/pedi but they were so kind and accommodating the whole way through!

features: Fume removal fans at nail tables
Largest variety of nail polish colours
